attestation_validator/AttestationValidat.title: AttestationValidatorRedeemer
attestation_validator/AttestationValidat.description:
The redeemer options for the attestation validator:
 - **Sign** is used when a new signer attaches his signature
   token to the Utxo.
 - **Retire** can only be invoked by "original_author" in case
   this attestation is no longer relevant.

protocol_parameters/ProtocolParametersMi.title: ProtocolParametersMintRedeemer
protocol_parameters/ProtocolParametersMi.description:
The redeemer options for the protocol parameters
 minting policy:
 - **Mint** is used for minting the protocol parameters
   authenticator token along with the admin token.
 - **MintRetireProtocol** is used for burning the
   protocol parameters token along with the admin token.

protocol_parameters/ProtocolParametersSp.title: ProtocolParametersSpendRedeemer
protocol_parameters/ProtocolParametersSp.description:
The redeemer options for the protocol parameters validator:
 - **Update** is invoked by the admin to upgrade the protocol.
 - **RetireScript** is used to delete the unneeded reference
   script Utxos.
 - **SpendRetireProtocol** can be used to delete the
   protocol parameters in case this version of the VeriScript
   protocol is retired.

signature_token_policy/SignatureTokenPol.title: SignatureTokenPolicyRedeemer
signature_token_policy/SignatureTokenPol.description:
The signature token minting policy has the following
 redeemer options:
 - **MintSignatureToken** is used for minting signature tokens
   that attest the agreement on the attestation data by the signer.
 - **Retire** is used by the creator of the attestation when
   retiring the Utxo and burning all the signature tokens with it.

signer_metadata_validator/SignerMetadata.title: SignerMetadataRedeemer
signer_metadata_validator/SignerMetadata.description:
The signer metadata validator allows only **Update**-ing
 the data enclosed in the Utxo datum.

types/AttestationDatum.title: AttestationDatum
types/AttestationDatum.description:
The attestation datum that describes the information the signer
 has validated.

 - **original_author**: is the creator of the attestation datum,
   the only one that can "retire" the Utxo in case it is no longer relevant (mandatory)
 - **description**: the human readable description of the script used to identify
   the contract (mandatory)
 - **source_code**: the link to the repository of the source code, should target
   the specific version of the source code used for building (mandatory)
 - **script_hash**: the hash of the compiled script (mandatory)
 - **script_address**, **staking_policy** and **minting_policy**: should point
   to the actual values of the compiled code where applicable (at least one of them
   must be filled)

types/SignerMetadataDatum.title: SignerMetadataDatum
types/SignerMetadataDatum.description:
The signer metadata holds the identifiers the signer
 is comfortable sharing with the community. This
 information can be used to further increase trust in
 a particular signer.

 Notes:
 - only `nick_name` is mandatory, all other fields are optional
 - ensuring the euthenticity of the data contained in the datum
   is outside of the protocol and hence may show non-factual information
